notes: Vendor hint 'Danielbrown.Net' is WRONG: that domain belongs to a different Daniel Brown (a retired IT/investment-banking/business professional whose bio page mentions Regional Head of Investment Banking Division IT, Carlson Companies, and Travel & Tourism roles — no dentistry content, no Flossmoor address, no matching phone). The practice's Facebook page loaded but showed no address/phone to corroborate. Multiple third-party directories (Healthgrades, WebMD, ADA Find-a-Dentist) agree on the practice's name/address/phone but none is the practice's own website, so per the corroboration rule no usable website could be confirmed.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Richard Mantoan founded Southland Smiles in 1985 and is presented as the practice founder/owner; six additional associate dentists (Gee, Alameri, Sulemanjee, Ryckowski, Naser, Rasberry) also practice there.
notes: Address (19815 Governors Hwy #7, Flossmoor, IL 60422) and phone (708-799-7800) exactly match record. Site states this is a single-location independent practice, not part of a multi-location group or DSO. No careers/hiring page found on about-us or contact-us pages.

owner_operator_stated: Site's Our Team page lists Dr. Marissa Zoladz, DDS as the lead dentist/owner and Dr. Sheila Lawler, DMD as an associate dentist who recently joined the practice.
notes: Record's named entity is associate dentist Sheila Lawler, but the practice operates publicly as 'Frankfort Smiles Dental,' owned/led by Dr. Marissa Zoladz; address (301 N. White St, Ste BB, Frankfort, IL 60423) and phone ((815) 464-6900) exactly match, and Lawler is confirmed as a current associate there (not owner) — not a successor conflict, just a solo-PC-vs-employer naming mismatch. No careers/hiring page found in full site navigation (Home/Services/About/Our Team/Testimonials/Forms/FAQ/Blog/Appointments).

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Eric Klein, DMD is identified as the practice's owner/dentist, specializing in general, cosmetic, and neuromuscular dentistry.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Denise (Maniakouras), DDS is listed as founder; multiple associate pediatric dentists and one orthodontist (Dr. Gary) also listed. Only first names given for associates on this page.
notes: Multi-location specialist (pediatric dentistry) group: Frankfort (this record's address 39 E Colorado Ave; phone (708) 789-9289 exactly matches), Oak Lawn, and Orland Park locations all operate under the 'Bite Size Pediatric Dentistry' brand founded by Dr. Denise Maniakouras. public_practice_name: Park Avenue Dental Care (formerly Kreuz & Duffner, DDS, Ltd.)
owner_operator_stated: Dr. James J. Kreuz, DDS is listed as founder/owner (practicing since 1973); Dr. Gregory J. Duffner, DDS is an associate (at this location since 1985); Dr. Alexander J. Dolinar, DMD is also an associate.
notes: The record's old domain kreuzduffner.com (vendor hint) is dead (connection refused) — the practice now runs its own site at parkavedentalcare.com under the DBA 'Park Avenue Dental Care.' Address (18040 Park Ave, Homewood, IL 60430) matches; record phone (708) 798-6868 exactly matches the site's listed 'Existing Patients' line (site also lists a separate (708) 792-2779 'New Patients' line). Both named record doctors, Kreuz (owner) and Duffner (associate), are still confirmed practicing there, so this is a rebrand/DBA change, not an ownership successor conflict. Single location, no indication of multi-location group/DSO. /employment/ returns 404 — no careers/hiring page found.
